🌆 Market News Digest  
April 29, 2026 (EST)

🔥 Top Stories  
• Fed holds rates at 3.75%, signals no immediate cuts amid geopolitical uncertainty — Powell emphasizes inflation risks and global tensions.  
• US economy shows resilience with strong housing and manufacturing data — housing starts at 1.5M, durable goods up 0.8%.  
• Major tech earnings beat expectations, boosting markets — Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Meta all report record or strong results.  
• Oil prices surge above $119 amid Middle East tensions and Iran sanctions — Brent hits highest since June 2022.  
• Iran warns of military retaliation over US seizure of ships; US maintains Iran blockade — escalating geopolitical risks.  

⛽ Oil & Energy  
• Brent crude closes near $118, WTI at $106.88, with supply disruptions and Iran tensions driving prices.  
• US weekly crude exports hit record 6M b/d, while inventories fall sharply.  
• US and Brent futures extend gains after OPEC+ signals possible output hike without UAE.  
• Fertilizer prices double to $900/ton due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions.  
• US considers prolonging Iran sanctions and military options amid escalating conflict.  

📊 Markets & Macro  
• S&P down 0.09%, Nasdaq flat, Dow down 0.6% post-Fed decision; markets price in higher-for-longer rates.  
• US 2-year Treasury yields hit 3.94%, 10-year at 4.40%, reflecting inflation concerns.  
• Investors increasingly bet on a rate hike in 2027, now 45% probability.  
• US housing starts at 1.5M, the highest since December 2024, with strong manufacturing data.  
• US trade deficit narrows slightly, but inventories and wholesale data show mixed signals.  

🌍 Geopolitical  
• Israel’s Netanyahu may visit US next week; no official schedule yet.  
• Iran warns of unprecedented military action; US and Iran continue ship seizures and sanctions.  
• Putin and Trump hold friendly 90-minute call, discuss Ukraine ceasefire and Iran nuclear proposals.  
• OPEC+ likely to increase output by 206K b/d, excluding UAE.  
• US pushes for extended ceasefire in Lebanon and Israel-Lebanon contacts amid regional escalation.  

🪙 Crypto & DeFi  
• Bitcoin supply held by conviction buyers surges 69%, reaching 2020 highs.  
• Stablecoins expand across Latin America; Tether leads BELO’s $14M raise.  
• Crypto Fear & Greed index at 26, signaling fear; markets remain volatile amid geopolitical risks.  

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy  
• US Senate advances Fed nominee Warsh; committee votes 14-0, full Senate vote pending.  
• EU plans to raise EU-bond funding target by €10B; EU cybersecurity proposal criticized by China.  
• US Justice Dept. indicts Mexican officials linked to drug trafficking; concerns over law enforcement.  
• US Supreme Court limits use of racial data in voting districting, impacting political maps.  
• UK and European markets brace for rate hikes; BOE and ECB signals of tightening.
